title: Wathe 汉化增强版
description: 优化Wathe的汉化表现，使其更符合中国人的语言习惯-Optimize Wathe's Chinese localization to better suit the language habits of Chinese people.
body:
![ChinesePlus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FfSZo3Ag/images/1d8bd7aaab9eba2ccf839c907abc35d27dc4ca97.png)
**Wathe 汉化增强版补丁** 是一个为 Fabric 模组 Wathe 提供优化版汉化的独立附加补丁
本补丁不包含任何游戏逻辑或代码修改，仅通过资源覆盖的方式，为 Wathe 提供 简体中文翻译，并在需要时对部分 界面图片、图标等资源进行替换或优化

该补丁以独立模组形式发布，无需修改或重打包原模组文件，安装与卸载都十分方便
它可以与 Wathe 的原版内容完全兼容，也不会影响游戏存档或多人联机

适合希望以中文体验 Wathe，或对界面资源有本地化需求的玩家使用

**Wathe ChinesePlus** is an independent addon for the Fabric mod Wathe.
This patch does not modify any gameplay logic or code. Instead, it works purely as a resource override, providing Simplified Chinese localization and optional UI/icon resource replacements or improvements.

The patch is distributed as a standalone mod, meaning it does not alter or repackage the original Wathe files.
It is easy to install or remove, fully compatible with the base mod, and safe to use in both singleplayer and multiplayer worlds.

Recommended for players who want a localized Chinese experience or refined visual resources when playing Wathe.
